title: Resolution Approving and Adopting the Municipal Disaster Risk Reduction and Management Council MDRRMC) 2021-11 Dated July 29, 2021 Entitled: ?resolution Realigning a Portion of the 5% Municipal Disaster Risk Reduction and Management Fund-continuing Appropriations Under General Fund for Cy 2021 Amounting to Ten Million Pesos (P10,000,000.00) for Social Welfare Goods to Be Taken From the Appropriation for Medicine (COVID-19 VACCINE)?.
